# Extract Data Values of an Object

Extract Data Values of an Object

## Usage

``` r
values(x, ...)

# S4 method for class 'ClusteredNeuroVec'
values(x)

# S4 method for class 'DenseNeuroVol'
values(x)

# S4 method for class 'SparseNeuroVol'
values(x)

# S4 method for class 'ROIVol'
values(x, ...)

# S4 method for class 'ROIVec'
values(x, ...)
```

## Arguments

- x:

  the object to get values from

- ...:

  additional arguments

## Value

A vector or array containing the values extracted from `x`.

## Examples

``` r
x <- NeuroSpace(c(10,10,10), c(1,1,1))
vol <- NeuroVol(rnorm(10 * 10 * 10), x)
values(vol)
#> , , 1
#>
```
